_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirements, testing protocols, approval gates, ongoing monitoring expectations, and the criteria for model retirement or replacement.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Task RM-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.537), RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.656). Shared vocabulary: [requirements, testing]. NICE-only terms [establish, specifications] vs WIDAI-only terms [approval, criteria, define, development, documentation, enforce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.923, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.056 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Establish testing specifications and requirements" and "Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirem" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.565 < STS 0.656 (gap -0.092). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [establish, specifications] and [approval, criteria, define] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [requirements, testing]. NICE-only: [establish, specifications]. WIDAI-only: [approval, criteria, define, development, documentation, enforce].
